title: SEC During First Virtual CMC Meeting
description: L-R,  Executive Commissioner Corporate Services, Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Ibrahim Boyi, Executive Commissioner Operations SEC Mr Dayo Obisan and Director General SEC Mr Lamido Yuguda duri
html: L-R,  Executive Commissioner Corporate Services, Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Ibrahim Boyi, Executive Commissioner Operations SEC Mr Dayo Obisan and Director General SEC Mr Lamido Yuguda during the First 2022 Virtual Capital Market Committee Meeting  in Abuja.
